mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO osh_seckill_goods_tag_rel (seckill_goods_id, tag_id, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{seckillGoodsId}, #{tagId}, 0, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updateBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_seckill_goods_tag_rel SET delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE seckill_goods_id = #{seckillGoodsId} AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
